drift.test: Gamma-Poisson posterior-predictive z, de-trended by the citywide recent/baseline ratio (excess over the common shock), with daily over-dispersion phi folded into the predictive SD

note: Per-cell Gamma-Poisson conjugate rate (closed-form online update) + emerging-hotspot drift alarm. λ is expected VIOLATIONS/day, never congestion; state is cell-level only, never per officer.
